what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links an attachment identifier to a board-item target in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
target uses a board:// URI pointing to item-725f3edc
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
file id att-17ee1e43 matches the filename
conventions: URI-style reference to an external board item
concerns: No explanatory content or context beyond the reference
The board:// target cannot be resolved from this file alone
No author or source information is recorded
notes: A bare attachment pointer that records a board-item link for the dragnet-development channel with no explanatory content.
questions: What content or state does board item item-725f3edc represent?

purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file acts as a typed, timestamped metadata stub pointing to a board item, consistent with its attachment_type and target fields.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a persistent, dated reference from a channel attachment to a specific board item for later retrieval or audit.
contribution: Provides a dated, typed link between an attachment identifier and a board item in the dragnet-development channel; a fused system would keep this provenance edge.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a channel attachment metadata stub in the dragnet-development channel that records a board_items attachment pointing to board://item-725f3edc with an added timestamp and no body content.
intention_for_embedding: It was meant to persist a reference from a channel attachment to a specific board item for ledger and retrieval purposes.
